business_goal: yarn test runs a real harness (working blob-util mock, controllable NativeCacheVideoHttpProxy mock, DeviceEventEmitter/AppState harness) plus one end-to-end integration test over the whole server lifecycle chain (start/retry/fail/observe/resolve) — the regression net every other scope's repro tests stand on (breadboard V5 infrastructure; declared CHOWDER: cross-cutting test infrastructure with no single business flow).
